![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Kitty%20Approved%20%3A3-%23f93?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=%23699&logo=data:image/png;base64,)

WARNING: WIP

Arrays are stupid. What if you could address them circularly? (also a "true" von-neuman architecture language)

A half silly, half serious code golfing language. Produced by 40% siffrin tears, 40% people who can code better than me, and 20% googling "how do i do x in python" and copy pasting the best result.

Inspired by Uiua, Jelly, APL, Vyxal, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Unicode_characters, the general concept of "magic circles", TIS-100, Hexcasting (for Minecraft) and Trickster (for Minecraft).

(Huge thanks to the members of the Gregtech New Horizons discord server, specifically Offtopic2! You guys are the goats!)
